member.summary: 获取用户是否存在当前仓库权限

member.name: M:SIE.Web.EMS.ViceTransfers.ViceTransfersDataQueryer.GetWarehouseLotQty(SIE.EMS.ViceTransfers.ViceTransferSparePartDetail)
member.summary: 管控方式为【批次】时，根据【批次号+质量状态+来源库位】获取可用库存或不良品数

member.name: M:SIE.Web.EMS.ViceTransfers.ViceTransfersDataQueryer.GetFixtureIDAccountLocation(SIE.EMS.ViceTransfers.ViceTransferFixtureDetail)
member.returns: 库位Id，库位名称，车间，产线

member.name: M:SIE.Web.EMS.ViceTransfers.ViceTransfersDataQueryer.GetFixtureStorageLocationQty(SIE.EMS.ViceTransfers.ViceTransferFixtureDetail)
member.summary: 管控方式为【编码】时 选择来源库位的时候获取 根据【工治具编码+质量状态+来源库位】获取合格数量或不合格数量
